question.text: Which of the following would disqualify a person from being appointed as a Trustee of a mutual fund?

answer.text: Being a director of another asset management company
Having more than 10 years of experience in financial services
Having a professional qualification in law

explanation.text: **The Logic:** No AMC director, officer or employee of any other AMC shall be eligible to be appointed as a Trustee. Also, a Trustee of one mutual fund cannot be a trustee of any other mutual fund. **The Trap:** Experience and qualifications are positive attributes, not disqualifying factors. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** These restrictions prevent conflicts of interest across mutual fund entities.
